name: Zac Sandford
text: Been coming to Blacksmith for around 2 years and never had a bad experience. Shoutout to Locky B — very talented and great for a chat.

name: Bradley Field
text: Going here over 4 years. Both my sons get done here too. They take the time to remember your name — no other barber is allowed to touch my hair or my sons'.

name: Ky O'Donnell
text: Can't rate this place higher. A 10/10 experience. Tried other barbers on the Gold Coast but I keep coming back. Bayli went above and beyond.

name: Selah Leighton
text: Tried a bunch of barbers — this is the only place I've gone to twice. Lachlan always gets me right. 10/10.

name: Peter Carrigy
text: Really cool local shop with a great atmosphere. Jarred has great attention to detail and an eye for what suits you. Will definitely go back.

name: Arsalan Khalid
text: Excellent and quick job by Ben today. Thanks my guy.

name: Kristy Neilson
text: From NSW and my boys are now convinced this is the only place they'll allow to cut their hair. Welcoming, and the care on every client is first class.

name: Scott Hamley
text: Probably one of the best haircuts I've had in a long time. Will definitely be a regular.

name: asher greensill
text: Best barber shop. 10/10, super chill, best fades.
